name: Extole Enterprise Referral Marketing API
what_it_does: Extole enterprise referral marketing REST API for large consumer brands to build and manage refer-a-friend programs, ambassador programs, and word-of-mouth marketing campaigns with fraud detection, reward fulfillment, and detailed analytics for customer acquisition at scale. Enables AI agents to manage referral program creation and configuration for enterprise word-of-mouth automation, handle advocate enrollment and unique referral link generation for acquisition automation, access referral conversion tracking and event processing for attribution automation, retrieve reward fulfillment and coupon distribution for incentive automation, manage fraud detection and referral validation for protection automation, handle program analytics and ROI reporting for optimization automation, access A/B testing of referral program variants for experimentation automation, retrieve advocate leaderboard and gamification for engagement automation, manage multi-step referral journey for complex acquisition automation, and integrate Extole with Salesforce, Braze, Klaviyo, and enterprise marketing stacks for end-to-end referral automation.
use_cases: Running enterprise refer-a-friend programs from customer acquisition agents
Tracking multi-touch referral conversions from attribution automation agents
Distributing referral rewards from incentive fulfillment agents
Detecting referral fraud from program protection agents
not_for: SMB referral programs (use Rewardful or FirstPromoter for SaaS/SMB referral)
Affiliate marketing (use Impact or Partnerize for publisher affiliate programs)
Simple loyalty points (use Smile.io or LoyaltyLion for loyalty-first programs)
best_when: An enterprise consumer brand with large customer base wanting AI agents to automate refer-a-friend programs, advocate enrollment, referral conversion tracking, and reward fulfillment at scale through Extole's enterprise referral marketing platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE SALES PROCESS REQUIRED: Extole is enterprise-priced with dedicated implementation; automated self-service API integration without Extole engagement is not supported; automated standalone integration requires partner onboarding and program configuration. PROGRAM CONFIGURATION PRECEDES API EVENTS: Extole referral programs must be configured (program rules, rewards, eligibility) before API events trigger referral actions; automated event sending to unconfigured program creates event accepted but no referral chain created. FRAUD DETECTION REVIEW DELAY: Extole fraud detection may hold referral rewards for manual review; automated reward fulfillment must handle pending status and not assume immediate reward; automated immediate fulfillment after referral conversion creates premature reward delivery before fraud review. REFERRAL LINK UNIQUENESS PER ADVOCATE: Extole referral links are unique per advocate and program; automated referral link generation must use Extole API not manual URL construction; automated manually constructed referral URL creates tracking bypass and incorrect attribution.

auth.notes: Extole uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2009 by Matt Roche and Jon Epstein. Backed by Battery Ventures, General Catalyst ($50M+ raised). Clients: Comcast, ASOS, SoFi, Capital One. Products: Refer-a-friend, ambassador programs, A/B testing, fraud detection, reward fulfillment. GDPR. SOC2. Serves enterprise consumer brands. Competes with Mention Me and Friendbuy for enterprise referral.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process required
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom enterprise pricing; typically $50,000-$250,000+/year based on program volume
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Battery/General Catalyst backed. Enterprise annual contract. Program volume-based pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; event and advocate APIs throttled; webhooks for conversion, reward, and fraud events

known_agent_gotchas: PROGRAM ZONE CONFIGURATION REQUIRED: Extole referral programs use 'zones' (embed points in customer lifecycle); automated referral requires correct zone configured; automated API event to wrong zone creates referral not tracked in program flow

REFERRAL REWARD STATE MACHINE: Extole rewards go through states (pending, fulfillable, fulfilled, expired); automated reward processing must handle state transitions; automated fulfillment polling must check state before triggering payout

ADVOCATE vs FRIEND TOKEN DISTINCTION: Extole issues different tokens for advocates (referrer) and friends (referred); automated referral chain tracking must use correct token type for each party; automated wrong token type creates incorrect referral attribution

FRAUD HOLD PERIOD BLOCKS IMMEDIATE FULFILLMENT: Extole fraud detection places rewards in hold for configurable period; automated reward distribution must respect fraud hold period; automated immediate post-conversion reward creates payout before fraud validation completes

CONVERSION EVENT DEDUPLICATION BY ORDER ID: Extole deduplicates conversion events by order/transaction ID; automated retry of failed conversion event must use same order ID; automated retry with new order ID creates duplicate referral credit for same purchase
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise referral. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Customer referral and conversion data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise referral. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer referral and behavioral data.
